## Runtime.IRuntimeConfection.isBarTruffle() method

Returns true if this is a bar truffle confection. When true, bar truffle-specific properties are available.

**Signature:**

```typescript
isBarTruffle(): this is IRuntimeBarTruffle;
```
**Returns:**

this is [IRuntimeBarTruffle](./ts-chocolate.runtime.iruntimebartruffle.md)
